column2: Percentage of the area where land imperviousness has changed in the past decade
column3: Average percentage of the area covered by trees
column4: Average change (in percentage) in overall tree cover density in the past decade
column5: Percentage of the area covered by grassland
column6: Percentage of grassland vegetation lost in the past decade
column7: Percentage of grassland vegetation gained in the past decade
column8: Percentage of the area that is heavily exploited by human activities
column10: Average temperature change (in Celsius degrees) with respect to the average temperature between 1971 and 2010
column11: Average evaporation change (as percentage) with respect to the average evaporation between 1971 and 2010
column12: Average water from rain (as percentage) with respect to the average evaporation between 1971 and 2010
column13: Average species richness (number of different species present) in a 50 m geographic cell
column14: Percentage of the area classified as being at low ecosystem risk
column15: Percentage of the area classified as being at ecosystem risk
